action.say: Go to the alice line. Control V to start the block.
Now J four times to extend down through all the names.
A thin column selected. Now E to widen it across the names.
A perfect rectangle. Five names in a block. No other mode can do this.
Now select just the numbers. Go to the first score.
Control V, then J four times.
Only that column is gone. The rest of the lines stay intact.
